High Blood Pressure: Overview
What hypertension is and why it matters.
https://example.health/articles/htn-overview

Common and uncommon symptoms.
https://example.health/articles/htn-symptoms

How doctors measure and confirm hypertension.
https://example.health/articles/htn-diagnosis

Treatment Options for Hypertension
Medications, diet, and exercise.

Dietary patterns, sodium, and activity.
https://example.health/articles/htn-lifestyle

Complications of High Blood Pressure
Heart disease, stroke, and kidney damage.
https://example.health/articles/htn-complications

Monitoring Your Blood Pressure at Home
Devices and best practices.

Let me know if you want details from any specific article.
